description:
The quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and advanced look‑around assertions, presented in an encouraging, instructional tone. It is positioned as moderately challenging, suitable for learners aiming to solidify and extend their regex skills through practice.
Topics: Basic regex patterns, Quantifiers, Capture groups, Look‑around assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and computer science students with introductory to intermediate experience in regex who want to deepen their understanding.
